consensus.summary: Both audits (Opus + Gemini-style) converge on the same core issues: the route aggregate receives zero hidden states (critical), lot of pruning due to aggressive death/taint rules, saturated pheromone deposit function, and batch aggregation bugs. Primary fix: wire encoder hidden states into route_aggregate immediately. Secondary fixes: adjust death_streak and normalize deposit. Also streamline tensor transfers to reduce memory pressure.
recommendations: P0: Fix route_aggregate hidden pass-through (encode hidden states from scorer and pass to graph).
P1: Change new_empty/new() phi initialization so empty slots have phi=0; only seeded edges have phi_init.
P1: Aggregate deltas across the entire batch before pheromone updates.
P2: Replace tanh(relu(Delta)) with tanh(Delta / sigma) or softplus mapping to avoid saturation.
P2: Increase death_streak for early warm-start; add respawn-from-pool behavior.
P3: Reduce cloning of tensors; use single transfer or memory-map where possible.
